admin.title: Platform Console
admin.subtitle: /admin is the owner operations console, separated from entity admin areas.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search users, entities, reports and logs
admin.console.eyebrow: Platform console · owner operations · view mode
admin.console.safeActionsCopy: These buttons are UI placeholders for now. Real blocks, refunds, role changes and data access must go through server-side permission checks, a required reason and an immutable audit log.
admin.console.rightRailCopy: Workspace for the platform owner and team. Entity admins must use their future routes: /band/:id/admin, /studio/:id/admin, /org/:id/admin, /event/:id/admin.
admin.console.groupSettingsMeta: Belong to the entity admin area.
admin.console.userSettingsMeta: Belong to account settings, not the owner console.
admin.overviewSubtitle: Platform-owner operations console. This is not a group, studio, organization or event admin area.
admin.usersSubtitle: Platform-wide user search, verification statuses, risk flags and safe support operations.
admin.entitiesSubtitle: Registry of groups, studios, organizations, venues and events without mixing into their own admin areas.
admin.reportsSubtitle: Unified queue of reports, appeals and escalations until real moderation processes are connected.
admin.moderationSubtitle: Platform moderation of content, profiles, report-scoped messages and entity visibility.
admin.trustSubtitle: Risk signals, blocked links, suspicious patterns, rating manipulation and anti-fraud.
admin.billingSubtitle: Plans, subscriptions, refunds and manual access grants, separate from entity and profile settings.
admin.contentSubtitle: Feed, comments, media, categories and recommended surfaces at the platform level.
admin.rolesSubtitle: Platform team matrix: owner, super admin, admins, moderators and specialized operators.
admin.localizationSubtitle: Language packs, translation keys, missing strings and future import/export flows.
admin.notificationsSubtitle: Platform announcements, templates, push/email/SMS policies and emergency notifications.
admin.auditSubtitle: Immutable log of role changes, restrictions, payment actions, moderation and data access.
admin.settingsSubtitle: Global platform flags, registration, security requirements, providers and feature flags.
admin.supportSubtitle: Ticket queue, SLA priorities and controlled read-only view-as-user. Does not grant entity admin rights.
admin.systemSubtitle: Deploy status, API and DB health, background jobs and maintenance mode. Observation only, no control actions.
admin.staffSubtitle: Platform team roles, assignments and escalations. Role changes go through approval and audit; view-only here.
admin.overview.row0m: /admin manages platform operations only; entity settings stay in entity admin areas.
admin.overview.row1m: Blocks, refunds, role changes and data access must go through server-side permission checks and audit.
admin.overview.row2m: The operations layer runs as a view mode. Real server-side actions are intentionally not connected.
admin.moderation.row0m: Hiding and removal go through moderation actions, not direct editing of user text.
admin.moderation.row1m: Moderators do not get blanket access to all private chats.
admin.moderation.row2m: Freeze, unpublish or review; entity admins keep their settings separate.
admin.trust.row0m: MVP blocks unsafe external-link behavior in chats and posts.
admin.trust.row1m: Device and IP risk belong to server-side policy until restrictions are enabled.
admin.trust.row2m: No-shows, cancellations and reviews require dispute history before a score changes.
admin.billing.row0m: Centralized plans and entitlements are managed by the platform owner.
admin.billing.row1m: Any manual access change must create an audit event.
admin.billing.row2m: Payment provider integration only after a separate policy slice is ready.
admin.content.row0m: The platform can recommend, hide or send posts for review.
admin.content.row1m: MIME validation and virus scanning remain server-layer tasks.
admin.content.row2m: Localizable names with no text inside assets.
admin.roles.row0m: Platform roles manage platform operations only; roles inside groups and studios stay in entity admin areas.
admin.roles.row1m: Assigning owner/super admin, removing a role and restricting team access require 2FA, a reason and audit.
admin.roles.row2m: The role matrix is a UI placeholder for now. Real role changes are not connected.
admin.localization.row0m: Strings stay in i18n JSON, not hardcoded in components.
admin.localization.row1m: Admin tooling will later surface untranslated keys by key section.
admin.notifications.row0m: Segmentation by role, language, city or entity type after the server layer.
admin.notifications.row1m: All notification texts must be localized and audited.
admin.notifications.row2m: An owner-level action with strict audit and confirmation.
admin.audit.row2m: Requires a reason and 2FA before real implementation.
admin.settings.row0m: Email, phone and OAuth requirements are managed here, not per entity.
admin.settings.row1m: 2FA for the elevated team and owners is a mandatory rule.
admin.settings.row2m: Controlled staged rollout before connecting broad social features.
admin.support.row0m: P0 — incident, P1 — urgent, P2 — standard, P3 — background. Response time is set by platform policy.
admin.support.row1m: Support sees the user context read-only; this is not account login and not entity admin rights.
admin.support.row2m: A support agent helps with the ticket without becoming an admin of the user's group, studio or organization.
admin.system.row0m: Public /api/v1/health and /api/v1/health/db checks reflect backend and DB availability.
admin.system.row1m: push main -> GitHub Actions -> VPS -> staging-deploy.sh -> smoke. Observed, not triggered here.
admin.system.row2m: Maintenance mode and kill switch are critical flags; toggling requires confirmation and audit.
admin.staff.row0m: super_admin, platform_admin, platform_moderator, support_agent, read_only_auditor - separate from entity roles.
admin.staff.row1m: Granting super_admin and removing roles require two-person approval, a reason and an immutable audit.
admin.staff.row2m: A staff member does not handle cases where they are a related party; the assignment goes to someone else.
